overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating through a dystopian urban environment. The character moves from a trash-filled enclosure through a paved plaza with a food vendor, toward a massive collapsed structure under bright golden hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-filled enclosure with garbage bags and concrete barriers

events.description: character with blue beanie passes in front of camera from right to left
character climbs over concrete barrier to exit trash enclosure

agents.ego_description: climbing over garbage bags and concrete barriers in a trash-filled enclosure

notable_agents.action: character with red hair and blue beanie walks past camera from right to left

entered.detail: piles of blue garbage bags stacked in the enclosure
low concrete wall separating trash area from path
tall palm trees lining the street in background
large vertical billboard with colorful advertising

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow trash-filled enclosure with blue garbage bags and green dumpsters. A character with a blue beanie passes by as the camera moves forward and climbs over a concrete barrier to exit the enclosure.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved pedestrian walkway with utility poles and food vendor

events.description: exiting trash enclosure onto paved pedestrian path
slowing down while approaching food vendor area

agents.ego_description: walking along a paved path, passing pedestrians and approaching a yellow and blue food truck

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking away from camera
vendor standing at yellow and blue food truck

entered.detail: colorful food vendor truck with yellow and blue panels
tall metal utility pole with transformers

segments.scene_description: Moving onto a paved pedestrian walkway lined with utility poles and palm trees. The character approaches a yellow and blue food truck where several pedestrians are gathered, passing by a concrete bench on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with collapsed megastructure and vendor booths

events.description: turning right to reveal large open plaza with collapsed structure
massive collapsed white structure becomes fully visible dominating the skyline

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking through an open plaza toward a massive collapsed white structure, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray outfit walking while looking at phone
child in red shirt running across the plaza

entered.detail: massive collapsed white structural framework lying at an angle across the plaza
small yellow booth with solar panels on roof
golden decorative statue near the booth
blue solar panels mounted on booth roof

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a wide open plaza revealing a massive collapsed white megastructure dominating the background. The character walks past a yellow vendor booth with solar panels and advertising posters, navigating through scattered pedestrians toward the wreckage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, cluttered alleyway into a vast, sun-drenched urban plaza dominated by ruins. It begins within a narrow enclosure filled with blue garbage bags and green dumpsters, moving forward as a character in a blue beanie passes by before climbing over a concrete barrier. As the camera exits the enclosure, the scene opens onto a paved pedestrian walkway lined with utility poles and palm trees, passing a concrete bench and a yellow and blue food truck crowded with people. The perspective then turns right into a wide open plaza, shifting from the narrow street to a sprawling space where the camera passes a yellow vendor booth with solar panels. Finally, the view expands to reveal a massive collapsed white megastructure that looms over the background as the character navigates through scattered pedestrians toward the wreckage.
